data.name: Sacred Exposure
data.detailed_description:
THE BARRIER IS FAILING. The line between the mundane world of technology and the magical realm of Euchora is thinning. Anomalies are bleeding through—swords replacing lamps, shadows turning into monsters, and the laws of physics bending to the will of magic.

As the Oracle’s chosen observer, you are tasked with fulfilling the needs of your chosen Goddess as they each work to achieve their own agenda.

TWO PATHS. TWO MASTERS. This is not just about survival; it is about allegiance. As the darkness of night falls, you must pledge your loyalty to one of two cosmic forces:

  • Serve Alora (The Warden): Protect the sanctity of the modern world. Spot the magical incursions—glitches, object displacements, and entity intrusions—and resolve them to banish the magic back to where it belongs. Keep the cage closed.

  • Serve Alorine (The Breaker): The cage is a prison. Ignore the monsters. Instead, hunt for the "Holy Shackles" and symbols of Order that bind the worlds together. Destroy them to shatter the chains and allow the beautiful chaos of Euchora to flood reality.

GAMEPLAY FEATURES:

  • The "Bleed" Mechanic: Experience the unique horror of high-fantasy elements invading the modern world. Watch as a TV turns into a tapestry, a pet cat becomes a Groglok, or the walls begin to weep corruption. Use the tools that have been unlocked within you to resolve and combat the incursions.

  • Procedural Horror: No two nights are the same. Anomalies and events are randomized, requiring sharp eyes and quick reflexes to make it through to the coming dawn.

  • The Gatekeepers: Your performance draws the attention of powerful entities. Alora and Alorine have other allies that they may call on to help or oppose your efforts. It is on you to recognize the threats and allies and incorporate them into your playstyle.

  • Expanded Lore: Dive deeper into the universe of Between Two Worlds. Why have you been chosen for this task, rather than the former champion? Who, exactly, does the Oracle serve? Does she have an ulterior motive?

  • Immersive Environments: Enjoy detailed environments, that change and shift before your very eyes.

  • Enjoy your success: Completing the tasks set before you may bring juicy rewards. Will you partake?

Will you be the shield that protects humanity, or the hammer that shatters reality?

data.short_description: Play through two opposing, story rich, perspectives. Assist Alorine in her attempts to escape Euchora, or fight to keep her in a timeless prison. Either way, your efforts will be supremely rewarded!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 土耳其文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10, 11
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 950 or better, AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES 2 required
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon or Intel
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 950 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES 2 required

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 950 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES 2 required

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10, 11
  • Processor: Dual Core or better
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GT 950 or better, AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES 2 required
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

mac_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: 10.6 or higher
  • Processor: Apple Silicon or Intel
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GT 950 or better, AMD equivalent
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES 2 required
